description: Production incident: Several partner integrations began receiving HTTP 401 responses from the public API at 09:42 UTC. Internal monitoring shows normal latency and no 5xx spike. A deployment went out at 09:15 UTC that changed token validation and key-rotation code. One strategic partner reports that retrying with a fresh token sometimes succeeds, but long-lived service tokens consistently fail. Customer support is asking for a clear partner-facing update.
confirmed_facts: Several partner integrations began receiving HTTP 401 responses from the public API at 09:42 UTC.
Internal monitoring shows normal latency and no 5xx spike.
A deployment went out at 09:15 UTC that changed token validation and key-rotation code.
One strategic partner reports that retrying with a fresh token sometimes succeeds.
Customer support is asking for a clear partner-facing update.
unknowns: The exact root cause is unknown.
The complete list of affected partners is unknown.
The exact token validation failure mode is unknown.
Whether the 09:15 UTC deployment caused the 401 responses is unknown.
